calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: August 29,2002
Judge Pro Tem:Karl Olson
Room 501A

Case called for settlement conference-All parties present.Stipulated judgment for plaintiff. Possession of premises located at520 South Van Ness Ave. #137. Total money judgment of $1,763.13 waived if premises vacated by Sept. 30,2002 at 5:00 pm.Writ of possession immediately stayed to Sept.30,2002 at 5:00 pm. Each side to bear own fees and costs. Plaintiff to prepare order.
